steps: Go to https://accounts.coursera.org/console and sign in with your Coursera account
Click 'Register a new application' or 'Create Application'
Enter an application name and description
Set the Redirect URI (use http://localhost:9876/callback for local development)
Submit the form to create your application
Copy your Client ID and Client Secret from the application details page
Use the client credentials OAuth flow to obtain a Bearer token: POST to https://accounts.coursera.org/oauth2/v1/token with grant_type=client_credentials

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: Bearer Token
credential_fields.description: OAuth 2.0 access token obtained via client credentials flow using your Client ID and Client Secret

notes: Coursera uses OAuth 2.0 client credentials flow — you exchange Client ID + Secret for a Bearer token
The Catalog API (courses, instructors, partners) is publicly readable but may require authentication for higher rate limits
Coursera's developer program is primarily focused on enterprise and institutional integrations
Access to user enrollment and learning data requires additional scope approval from Coursera

test_endpoint.description: List 5 courses from the Coursera catalog
